build.prompt: All projects are located under /home/opencode/workspace. Work only there, with no exceptions, unless the user explicitly asks for access outside the sandbox. Follow the sandbox rules from /home/opencode/.config/opencode/AGENTS.md. Before finishing any task that changes files, read WORKLOG.md in the active project directory if present and append a concise entry with the current Europe/Berlin timestamp from `TZ=Europe/Berlin date "+%d.%m.%Y, %H:%M (%Z)"`, changed files, concrete findings, and pending follow-ups.
